message:
feat(demo): polish dashboard and shakespeare demo screens

Additional polish and feature additions to the showcase demo screens.

dashboard.rs enhancements:
- Add real-time metric refresh with configurable interval
- Implement sparkline history depth configuration
- Add gauge threshold indicators (warning/critical zones)
- Support compact mode for smaller terminal sizes
- Add keyboard shortcuts for metric navigation
- Improve layout responsiveness during resize

shakespeare.rs improvements:
- Add act/scene navigation with quick jump
- Implement text search with highlight
- Add character dialogue filtering
- Support variable line spacing
- Add reading progress indicator
- Improve scroll behavior for long passages
- Add annotation support with inline markers

Both screens now better demonstrate:
- Adaptive layout techniques
- Keyboard-driven navigation patterns
- Real-time data visualization
- Large text content handling

These changes make the demo more useful as both a showcase and
a reference implementation for common TUI patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
